# tiff public API — supported surface (default features)
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.
#
# files: tiff.txt 703 lines (supported surface) | tiff.features.txt 0 added (features: deflate,fax,jpeg,lzw,webp,zstd) | tiff.internal.txt 66 lines (66 hidden + 0 excluded-feature)

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                 7
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)        90
#   pub consts/statics                         30
#   free functions                              4
#   inherent methods                          178
#   struct fields                              29
#   enum variants                             246
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)       264
#   conditional trait impls (verbatim)          7
#   auto-trait-complete types                  69
#   auto-trait exceptions                       9
#
# per-module pub lines:
#   (root)                          122
#   decoder                         193
#   encoder                         123
#   tags                            146

## items (584 lines)

pub struct encoder::TiffKindBig
pub struct encoder::TiffKindStandard
pub trait encoder::TiffKind
pub type encoder::TiffKind::OffsetArrayType: ?core::marker::Sized + encoder::TiffValue
pub type encoder::TiffKind::OffsetType: core::convert::TryFrom<usize, Error = core::num::error::TryFromIntError> + core::convert::Into<u64> + encoder::TiffValue
pub fn encoder::TiffKind::convert_offset(u64) -> TiffResult<Self::OffsetType>
pub fn encoder::TiffKind::convert_slice(&[Self::OffsetType]) -> &Self::OffsetArrayType
pub fn encoder::TiffKind::write_entry_count<W: std::io::Write>(&mut encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>, usize) -> TiffResult<()>
pub fn encoder::TiffKind::write_header<W: std::io::Write>(&mut encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> TiffResult<()>
pub fn encoder::TiffKind::write_offset<W: std::io::Write>(&mut encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>, u64) -> TiffResult<()>
pub trait encoder::TiffValue
pub const encoder::TiffValue::BYTE_LEN: u8
pub const encoder::TiffValue::FIELD_TYPE: tags::Type
pub fn encoder::TiffValue::bytes(&self) -> usize
pub fn encoder::TiffValue::count(&self) -> usize
pub fn encoder::TiffValue::data(&self) -> alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>
pub fn encoder::TiffValue::write<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &mut encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> TiffResult<()>
pub const [T; N]::BYTE_LEN: u8
pub const [T; N]::FIELD_TYPE: tags::Type
pub fn [T; N]::bytes(&self) -> usize
pub fn [T; N]::count(&self) -> usize
pub fn [T; N]::data(&self) -> alloc::borrow::Cow<'_, [u8]>
pub fn [T; N]::write<W: std::io::Write>(&self, &mut encoder::writer::TiffWriter<W>) -> TiffResult<()>
pub type encoder::Predictor = tags::Predictor

pub tags::ByteOrder::LittleEndian

pub type TiffResult<T> = core::result::Result<T, TiffError>

## auto traits

69 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
TiffError: !RefUnwindSafe !UnwindSafe
decoder::Decoder<R>: !Freeze !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !Unpin !UnwindSafe
decoder::DecodingSampleSlice<'a>: !UnwindSafe
decoder::EntryBytesReader<'lt, R>: !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !UnwindSafe
decoder::IfdDecoder<'lt>: !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !UnwindSafe
encoder::DirectoryEncoder<'a, W, K>: !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !Unpin !UnwindSafe
encoder::DirectoryOffset<K>: !Freeze !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !Unpin !UnwindSafe
encoder::ImageEncoder<'a, W, C, K>: !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !Unpin !UnwindSafe
encoder::TiffEncoder<W, K>: !Freeze !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !Unpin !UnwindSafe
